programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: The Holzer Files
programme.desc: (M) The team resurrects Hans Holzer's case file on the Morris-Jumel Mansion in New York City. They investigate reports of a dark, mysterious presence lurking in the historic home.
